2604.09349.title: Visually-Guided Policy Optimization for Multimodal Reasoning
2604.09349.paper_summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has significantly advanced the reasoning ability of vision-language models (VLMs). However, the inherent text-dominated nature of VLMs often leads to insufficient visual faithfulness, characterized by sparse attention activation to visual tokens. More importantly, our empirical analysis reveals that temporal visual forgetting along reasoning steps exacerbates this deficiency. To bridge this gap, we propose Visually-Guided Policy Optimization (VGPO), a novel framework to reinforce visual focus during policy optimization. Specifically, VGPO initially introduces a Visual Attention Compensation mechanism that leverages visual similarity to localize and amplify visual cues, while progressively elevating visual expectations in later steps to counteract visual forgetting. Building on this mechanism, we implement a dual-grained advantage re-weighting strategy: the intra-trajectory level highlights tokens exhibiting relatively high visual activation, while the inter-trajectory level prioritizes trajectories demonstrating superior visual accumulation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VGPO achieves better visual activation and superior performance in mathematical multimodal reasoning and visual-dependent tasks.
2604.09349.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習與可驗證獎勵（RLVR）顯著提升了視覺-語言模型（VLMs）的推理能力。<lb/>然而，VLMs固有的文本主導特性往往導致視覺忠實度不足，其特徵是對視覺標記的注意力激活稀疏。<lb/>更重要的是，我們的實證分析顯示，在推理步驟中，時間性視覺遺忘加劇了這一缺陷。<lb/>為了彌補這一差距，我們提出了視覺引導政策優化（VGPO），這是一個新穎的框架，用於在政策優化過程中加強視覺焦點。<lb/>具體而言，VGPO最初引入了一種視覺注意補償機制，利用視覺相似性來定位和增強視覺線索，同時在後續步驟中逐步提高視覺期望，以對抗視覺遺忘。<lb/>基於這一機制，我們實施了一種雙粒度優勢重加權策略：軌跡內層面強調相對較高視覺激活的標記，而軌跡間層面則優先考慮顯示出更優視覺累積的軌跡。<lb/>大量實驗表明，VGPO在數學多模態推理和視覺依賴任務中實現了更好的視覺激活和卓越的性能。
2604.09349.author: Zengbin Wang et.al.
2604.09349.authors: Zengbin Wang, Feng Xiong, Liang Lin, Xuecai Hu, Yong Wang, Yanlin Wang, Man Zhang, Xiangxiang Chu
